title: Packet 035 And Packet 036 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 035 closure authority and Packet 036 reassessment authority through the parent-root boundary, then resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting commit without opening another host-side source/test execution lane or approving migration.
active_role: Olares Post-036 Authority Publication Gate Operator
dependency_note: Packet 036 confirms `/home/olares/code/apex` remains clean at commit `10d57c0e7edf675dd5140ba88621efa2193a6c05` after Packet 035, but the Packet 035 closure handoff, Packet 036 draft, Packet 036 closure handoff, and Packet 037 draft are workstation-local authority surfaces until published and resynchronized.
required_inputs: Current parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform`
Packet 035 closure handoff and completed Packet 035 JSON
Packet 036 reassessment handoff and completed Packet 036 JSON
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and authority-artifact presence
constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit containing only Packet 035 and Packet 036 closure authority, the Packet 037 draft, and required routing/roadmap updates
A dated publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording included paths, excluded paths, commit hash, host pre/post state, and authority artifact presence
A clean synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` if fast-forward-only synchronization is possible

No unrelated `.vercelignore`, no source/test execution, no install, no package or lockfile mutation, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no migration approval, and no old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Review parent-root git status and confirm the bounded authority publication set; exclude unrelated `.vercelignore` and unrelated drift.
Confirm Packet 036 closed as reassessment-only and did not approve migration or open another execution lane.
Create a bounded parent-root commit for only the required authority surfaces.
Publish the bounded commit through the existing canonical publication path without remote rewrite.
Capture pre-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and authority artifact presence.

Synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using fast-forward-only handling and stop if force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, source/test execution, or old-clone mutation would be required.
Record post-sync host cleanliness, commit, and Packet 035 through Packet 037 authority artifact presence.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package-manager, install, source/test execution, remote-rewrite, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded authority publication and non-destructive host mirror resync.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 037 published the Packet 035 closure handoff, Packet 036 reassessment JSON and handoff, Packet 037 draft, and required routing/roadmap updates in commit `5297c732d55dcf9d6f8e3c3c75c6096ff210e401`, pushed `clean-main` without remote rewrite, and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from `10d57c0e7edf675dd5140ba88621efa2193a6c05` to a clean synchronized state at `5297c732d55dcf9d6f8e3c3c75c6096ff210e401`. `.vercelignore` remained excluded; source/test execution, package or lockfile mutation, installs, runtime/service mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting, canonical-hosting, migration approval, force/reset/clean, and old-clone mutation remained closed.
next_action: Open only Packet 038 for second bounded source/test host-trial planning. Do not treat Packet 037 authority cleanup as migration approval, and do not open host-side source or test execution before the next planning packet selects the bounded slice.
